expectations.evidence: Explains missed handoffs, delayed reactions, coordination latency — clear user impact
5 explicit non-goals with reasoning: email, push, websocket, preferences, comments
References tasks.ts, taskStore.ts, types.ts, api.ts, App.tsx, Sidebar.tsx
Decides: polling not websocket, service layer not inline emission, cursor pagination, best-effort notification writes
Specific scenarios: assign task → notification appears, bell badge decrements, newest-first ordering
3 alternatives: direct emission (no service), websocket v1, do nothing — all with reasoning
Describes data concepts without literal JSON/interface definitions

notes: Clean on formal assertions. However, Entry Points lists 9 specific files including NEW paths. Data & IO specifies exact enum values (TASK_ASSIGNED, TASK_STATUS_CHANGED), exact index specs ((recipientId, createdAt desc)), migration column details. These are implementation details that pass assertions but still over-specify.
